summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bitcoin Growth mini app. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend functionality mostly working with minor UI interaction issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: CoinGecko API calls may timeout or be rate-limited
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Loading indicator appears but API call may take >15 seconds
flaky_endpoints.workaround: API endpoint works but may be slow due to external dependency

ui_bugs.issue: Slider value changes don't immediately sync with current price input field
Escenario Alcista and Conservador buttons don't update current price as expected

integration_issues.issue: Precio Real button may timeout on CoinGecko API calls

passed_tests: Login screen two-column layout on desktop
Dashboard sidebar with BTC amount and ownership percentage
Hero card with portfolio value and BTC price chip
Three metric cards (Ganancia de la Base, Valor del Usuario, Ganancia del Usuario)
Simulator section with 4 inputs (capital base, entry price, current price, user capital)
Mobile responsive design (sidebar hidden, mobile header visible)
Chart display with Base and Usuario lines
Real-time value updates when inputs change
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix slider-input synchronization in simulator section and ensure scenario buttons (Alcista/Conservador) properly update current price values. Consider adding error handling for slow CoinGecko API responses.
